create_btn: Ƙirƙiri kuma Haɗa Akwatin saƙo mai shiga
page_desc: Babban sabis ɗin imel na ɗan lokaci don kare keɓantawa da toshe spam.
welcome_msg: Barka da zuwa Temp Mail King!
no_new_msg: Ba ku da sabbin saƙonni a wannan lokacin.
duplicate_email_error: Adireshin ya riga ya wanzu a cikin laburare! Gwada prefix na imel daban.
delete_confirm: Shin kun tabbata kuna son share wannan akwatin saƙo mai shiga?
delete_success: An cire akwatin saƙo mai shiga.
copy_email_success: Hanyar kunnawa cikin sauri an kwafi cikin nasara
copy_password_success: An kwafi kalmar sirri cikin nasara
privacy_content:
• Ba mu adana saƙonni na dindindin; ana share su ta atomatik.
  • Ta amfani da rukunin yanar gizon, kun yarda da goge bayanan ta atomatik kowane minti 20.
faq_content:
Har yaushe imel ɗin zai kasance?

Ana share ɗakin karatu kowane minti 20 don tabbatar da sirri.

Shin sabis ɗin kyauta ne?

Ee, sabis ɗin kyauta ne gaba ɗaya.
privacy_policy_content:
• Ba mu adana saƙonni na dindindin; ana share su ta atomatik.
  • Ta amfani da rukunin yanar gizon, kun yarda da goge bayanan ta atomatik kowane minti 20.
email_taken_error: Yi haƙuri, wannan sunan ana amfani dashi a halin yanzu, gwada wani
inbox_full_desc: Kun kai iyakar iyaka. Da fatan za a ƙirƙiri sabon imel.
expiry_warning: Gargadi: Wannan imel ɗin zai lalace ta atomatik bayan mintuna 20!
